title: Undertake agricultural crop harvesting activities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake agricultural crop harvesting activities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to harvest agricultural crops

pcs.text: Determine requirements for work according to harvest strategy and crop production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine requirements for work according to harvest strategy and crop production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine requirements for work according to harvest strategy and crop production plan.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Complete pre-harvest treatments to crop according to harvest strategy and crop production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete pre-harvest treatments to crop according to harvest strategy and crop production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete pre-harvest treatments to crop according to harvest strategy and crop production plan.

pcs.text: Sample crop for moisture content and report to supervisor to assess timing of harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sample crop for moisture content and report to supervisor to assess timing of harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sample crop for moisture content and report to supervisor to assess timing of harvest.

pcs.text: Identify hygiene requirements for the crop and paddock according to harvest strategy, standards and storage plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hygiene requirements for the crop and paddock according to harvest strategy, standards and storage plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hygiene requirements for the crop and paddock according to harvest strategy, standards and storage plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to harvest agricultural crops

elements.title: Prepare the harvesting equipment

pcs.text: Clean harvesting machinery and equipment or technology according to hygiene, biosecurity and fire mitigation standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean harvesting machinery and equipment or technology according to hygiene, biosecurity and fire mitigation standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean harvesting machinery and equipment or technology according to hygiene, biosecurity and fire mitigation standards.

pcs.text: Assess and service machinery and equipment and make adjustments and repairs as required and according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and service machinery and equipment and make adjustments and repairs as required and according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and service machinery and equipment and make adjustments and repairs as required and according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Record maintenance and servicing activities according to procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record maintenance and servicing activities according to procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record maintenance and servicing activities according to procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare the harvesting equipment

elements.title: Harvest crops

pcs.text: Harvest crop according to harvest strategy for each paddock,
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Harvest crop according to harvest strategy for each paddock,?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Harvest crop according to harvest strategy for each paddock,.

pcs.text: Operate harvesting machinery and ancillary equipment efficiently for conditions to ensure fire prevention measures are implemented
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate harvesting machinery and ancillary equipment efficiently for conditions to ensure fire prevention measures are implemented?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate harvesting machinery and ancillary equipment efficiently for conditions to ensure fire prevention measures are implemented.

pcs.text: Maintain equipment hygiene and biosecurity procedures during crop harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain equipment hygiene and biosecurity procedures during crop harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain equipment hygiene and biosecurity procedures during crop harvest.

pcs.text: Check and adjust harvester and ancillary equipment to ensure efficient and safe operation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and adjust harvester and ancillary equipment to ensure efficient and safe operation.

pcs.text: Clean and store equipment, attachments and other ancillary equipment according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store equipment, attachments and other ancillary equipment according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records and documentation of harvest according to workplace procedures.
